description_long: This cash register features a robust, angular design with a combination of wood-textured and metallic surfaces. The front section is recessed, providing space for a user to interact with the device, and is flanked by two thick, sturdy side panels. Atop the register sits a prominent display screen with a dark interface and blue text, paired with a cyan-colored keyboard and two circular touchpads or buttons. The rear and sides are mostly solid, with the wood grain trim running along the top and bottom edges, and the main body is finished in a matte gray with subtle wear marks. The overall construction suggests durability and a modern, utilitarian aesthetic suitable for urban commercial environments. No visible cash drawer or receipt printer slot is present, and there are no discernible brand markings.
description: A modern, angular cash register with a wood-trimmed, metallic body, a digital display, and a cyan keyboard with touchpads. The design is sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for urban commercial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed workspace, digital display, cyan keyboard, and two circular touchpads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wood trim and the angled position of the display screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, unbroken panel with wood trim and no visible interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side panel and the edge of the display and keyboard.
attribute_keypad_layout: rectangular grid with approximately 20 cyan keys and two circular touchpads
